messages.content:
Pop was originally launched on 29 May 2003 by Chart Show Channels (CSC) Media Group as Toons&Tunes. Toons&Tunes was then later rebranded as its current name, Pop (formerly stylized as pop and POP!) in the following month.

In the channel’s early years, links were presented by Rorry, a lime green dragon with a Scottish accent, who was animated live. He was accompanied by Purrdy, a dragon/cat hybrid who also appeared in the original Tricky programme on ITV1, it was sometimes followed by a programme known as “The Cheeky Monkey Show” which features the live links of the animated coloured monkeys known as “The Cheeky Monkeys,” that was later known by appearing on its sister channel Tiny Pop until its retirement at the end of June 2009.

Originally, the network focused on music videos with animated programming also part of the schedule, but with the numerous music video network options on British television at the time, this focus was quickly abandoned in 2004, when the animated content became much more prominent. Music videos continued to be carried on and off until 2010, before eventually being abandoned entirely.[citation needed, In 2010, Pop had several popular shows, such as The Smurfs, Kikoriki, Oggy and the Cockroaches, etc.

In 2012, Pop introduces semi-mascots known as the MoonGoons, These are animal-like aliens, with the 2 main ones being a blue squid named Boofus and an orange rabbit named Diggle, These were gone by the time of the channel’s next rebrand in 2015, Also in 2014 CSC Media Group had folded into Sony.

On 1 September 2020, Pop rebranded its on-air identity, with the premiere of Bakugan: Armored Alliance. And on the same day, starting with Pokémon Journeys: The Series, the network became the new British home of the Pokémon anime, moving from its previous broadcasters, ITV1 and CITV, of over 20 years. The channel was also sold by Sony to Narrative Entertainment

On 9 November 2022, Narrative Entertainment announced the launch of a new FAST channel, Pop Kids, to stream on Samsung TV Plus, the new FAST network airs shows from Pop and Tiny Pop.

Sometime in 2022, Pop began to branch into YouTube content, as they approached Joe Tasker for a new show called Swipe It! With Joe Taker, they would later acquire from content creators to use on their channel, including LankyBox, Denis and EthanGamer (the latter exclusively airing on Pop Player).

By 2023 Alvin & the Chipmunks, Squish, Miraculous Ladybug and Pokemon were among the channels popular shows,

The channels current mascot is a talking potato from Swipe It!, Also Jamie and Anna from Toonattik as of December 2023

 In September 2023 the channel introduced Toonattik, a revival of the CITV programming block of the same name, Pop
edit
The channel sources its programming from multiple production and distribution studios. Programming includes original shows such as Swipe It! With Joe Tasker, and acquired programming such as Alvinnn!!! and the Chipmunks, Miraculous: Tales of Ladybug & Cat Noir and Pokémon. The channel also includes movies and specials such as the Barbie television films, Pokémon and Monster High.[1]

Zorro: Generation Z.  Write a forum convo in late 2024 where a Squish/Lamput/Pokemon/Chaotic marathon airs, also, YooHoo ia returning in the new year

Title: Upcoming Squish/Lamput/Pokemon/Chaotic Marathon + Exciting YooHoo News!

User1: Hey fellow Pop viewers! Just saw the schedule for the end of the year marathon on Pop. Looks like we're getting back-to-back episodes of Squish, Lamput, Pokemon, and Chaotic to round off 2024. Can't wait to binge-watch my favorites.

User2: Sweet! I've been hoping for a Chaotic marathon. It's one of those shows that seriously takes me back. The strategy, the characters... really underrated in my opinion. And pairing it with Pokemon? Genius planning by Pop.

User3: Lamput for the win! I adore that show. It’s so quirky and creative, definitely a breath of fresh air amidst all the traditional programming. Does anyone know the exact dates and times for the marathon?

User4: I think it’s set to start on December 29th, if I’m not mistaken. Should run all the way through New Year’s Eve. Can’t think of a better way to close out the year, honestly. And have y’all heard the news about YooHoo?

User1: YooHoo news? No, I missed it. What’s happening with YooHoo?

User4: Oh, it’s coming back! New episodes slated for early 2025. Pop announced it on their social media some days back. Seems they’re revamping the universe a bit to introduce some new characters and plotlines. I’m curious to see how they’ll breathe new life into it.

User2: That’s amazing! YooHoo has always had such a fun world with its focus on environmental conservation and friendship. Excited to see the direction they take with the new stories.

User5: Definitely marking my calendar for both the marathon and the YooHoo premiere. Pop really knows how to keep the nostalgia alive while still bringing in fresh content. Now, if they could only bring back some Total DramaRama…

User3: For sure, Total DramaRama deserves a comeback! Anyway, back to the marathon, I hope they include some of the classic Pokemon episodes. There’s nothing like those epic Ash and Pikachu moments to ring in the new year.

User1: Couldn’t agree more. Well, folks, looks like we’ve got an exciting lineup to look forward to. Remember to stock up on your favorite snacks! It’s going to be an epic end-of-year marathon. Plus, with YooHoo on the horizon, 2025 is looking pretty awesome for Pop viewers.

Moderator: Just chiming in to confirm the marathon starts at 10 am on December 29th and will run until midnight on December 31st. And yes, the excitement for YooHoo’s return is palpable. We promise it’s going to be worth the wait. Stay tuned for more updates, and as always, thank you for making Pop your go-to place for fun and entertainment!

User2: Thanks for the confirmation, Moderator! Can’t wait for the marathon and everything else Pop has in store for us. Here’s to ending 2024 with a bang and starting 2025 on a high note!
Write a tweet about the show airing at midnight just after the Chaotic episode "Fighting Friendly" (the one where it looks like Tom cheated in the match)

🌌✨Just watched "Fighting Friendly" on #Chaotic and the suspense is REAL! Did Tom really cheat in the match? 😱 Can't wait to dive into what's next at midnight. The plot thickens, and I'm here for it! #ChaoticMarathon 🌀🔥 Grab your snacks, it's going to be an epic night! 🍿🌜
Write a tweet where Pop reveal the show airing at 12am on Jan 1 2025

🎉📺 Ring in the New Year with a bang as #PopTV presents a special surprise! 🌟 Join us at 12am on Jan 1, 2025, for the exclusive premiere of #YooHooAndFriends! 🐾 Embark on new adventures filled with friendship, mystery, and fun! 🌈✨ Don’t miss this magical journey. #NewYearNewYooHoo 🥳🎆
Write a forum convo saying its weird to go from one of the most suspenseful Chaotic eps to a cutesy show, Also, a user wonders if Kikoriki will ever return

**ChaoticFan01**: Did anyone else find it super odd that Pop went straight from one of the most suspenseful *Chaotic* episodes - you know, the one where it looks like Tom cheated - to a cutesy show like *YooHoo and Friends* at midnight? Talk about mood whiplash! 😅

**CutesyToonsLover**: Haha, I actually thought it was a nice change of pace! After all that tension in *Chaotic*, *YooHoo and Friends* felt like a comfy palate cleanser. But I get what you're saying; it was definitely an unexpected transition. 🐾✨

**SuspenseSeeker123**: Totally get both sides here, but yeah, it threw me for a loop too. I was so geared up from the *Chaotic* cliffhanger, ready for more edge-of-your-seat action, and then...bam, cute animals saving the world. Not what I was primed for, honestly. 🤣

**NostalgiaNerd**: Speaking of shows, does anyone know if *Kikoriki* will ever make a comeback on Pop? I miss those quirky little characters. It had such a unique charm compared to what's available now. 🐰🌎

**ChaoticFan01**: @NostalgiaNerd, I haven't heard anything about a *Kikoriki* return, but I'm with you. That show was something special. Maybe with all the revivals happening, Pop will consider bringing it back. Here's hoping!

**ToonTasticMod**: @NostalgiaNerd, nothing's been announced regarding *Kikoriki* as of yet, but it's always possible with enough interest! Pop's lineup has been full of surprises lately. Keep an eye on their announcements - you never know what might pop up next. 📺🌟

**CutesyToonsLover**: Fingers crossed for *Kikoriki*! Meanwhile, I'm just over here enjoying the variety on Pop. There's something kinda cool about not knowing what to expect next - whether it's suspenseful, adorable, or downright quirky. 😜🌈

**SuspenseSeeker123**: True, the variety keeps things interesting. Alright, I'm sold on riding the vibe wave, whatever it may bring. Guess it's part of the adventure with Pop's lineup! 🚀🎉
Write a follow up where Squish becomes Toonattik only, hinting at its potential removal

**ChaoticFan01**: Hey everyone, have you noticed that *Squish* has become exclusive to the Toonattik block lately? Seems like it's no longer in the regular Pop schedule. 🤔

**NostalgiaNerd**: Yeah, I spotted that too. It's kind of worrying. Does this mean Pop is considering removing *Squish* entirely? I really hope not. It's one of the more unique shows they have. 🍄

**ToonTasticMod**: It's not uncommon for networks to shuffle shows around to see where they fit best. But you're right; moving *Squish* to Toonattik-only airing does raise some questions about its future on Pop. 📅📺

**CutesyToonsLover**: That would be a shame if they're thinking of pulling it. Maybe they're just trying to boost Toonattik's viewership by placing popular shows there? *Squish* does have a pretty devoted fanbase. 🤷‍♂️💖

**SuspenseSeeker123**: Could be a strategic move, but it also feels like a last hurrah. I noticed this pattern before with other shows before they were taken off the air. Let's just hope *Squish* isn't heading down that path. 🤞

**ChaoticFan01**: Has anyone tried reaching out to Pop for clarification? It would be nice to get some official info rather than speculating. Plus, if there are enough of us showing support for *Squish*, maybe we can influence its stay. ✉️📣

**NostalgiaNerd**: Great idea, @ChaoticFan01. I'll draft up an email and share it here first for feedback. If we all send a version, it might just get their attention. And who knows, it could help keep *Squish* around. 📩🚀

**ToonTasticMod**: That’s the spirit! Viewer feedback really does make a difference. Keep the conversation respectful and constructive. Additionally, you might want to consider starting a hashtag campaign on social media to show your support.🖊️#SaveSquish

**CutesyToonsLover**: Count me in! *Squish* has brought a lot of joy and it deserves to be recognized. Let's band together and show how much this show means to us. 🌟👫

**SuspenseSeeker123**: Here’s to hoping we can make a difference! It's not just about saving a show; it's about letting networks know that these unique, quirky toons have a place and an audience. 📚🎨
Write a follow up where some of the old mascots are back, also a user is almost begging for Kikoriki back

**ToonTasticMod**: Exciting News, Toon Fans! 🎉 If you haven’t already seen it, Pop is bringing back some of the old mascots! That’s right, Rorry and Purrdy are making their grand return, and it looks like they're going to be part of the channel's promotional lineup once more! 🐉🎈

**ChaoticFan01**: Whoa, that's nostalgia overload! I missed those two. It's like a piece of my childhood is coming back. Wonder if this means Pop is leaning into the nostalgia factor for their programming. 📺💭

**NostalgiaNerd**: Seeing the old mascots return got me all emotional. 😭 Speaking of nostalgia, I’m just going to put this out there again - any chance we'll see Kikoriki make a similar return? I mean, no harm in asking...again, right? 🐰🙏 #BringBackKikoriki

**CutesyToonsLover**: @NostalgiaNerd, you and me both! I've been secretly hoping for a Kikoriki comeback every time Pop announces something. Those little critters have such a special place in my heart. 🧡💙

**SuspenseSeeker123**: Excited about the mascot news! And to @NostalgiaNerd, never stop believing! Maybe with all these returns and the channel listening to fan feedback, Kikoriki has a fighting chance. We've seen crazier comebacks! 🎊🙌

**RetroToonAddict**: Honestly, seeing Rorry and Purrdy is surreal after all this time. It's a clever move by Pop. And hey, count me in the Kikoriki campaign. If there’s even a slim chance it could come back by us voicing our love for it, then it’s worth a shot! 🗣️✨

**NostalgiaNerd**: I genuinely appreciate all the support, everyone. Maybe we should start something...like a petition or a dedicated hashtag for Kikoriki. It worked for some other shows, right? I'm almost begging here - I need my Kikoriki fix! 😅✍️ #KikorikiComeback

**ChaoticFan01**: A hashtag is a great idea! And maybe we can compile some of our favorite Kikoriki moments or episodes and share them online? Could be a fun way to engage more fans and get their attention. 🎬🤳 #KikorikiComeback

**ToonTasticMod**: Love the enthusiasm and dedication you all have for bringing back Kikoriki! Remember, positive fan movements can really make a difference. Let's keep this energy going and who knows? We might just get a surprise announcement one day. 🌈📣

**CutesyToonsLover**: With the mascots back and the community rallying for Kikoriki, it feels like we're on the brink of some major comebacks. Here’s hoping we add another victory with Kikoriki! 🎉🍀 #KikorikiComeback

Write a tweet saying with Chaotic, Squish, YooHoo, Pokemon and Alvin, things might be packed, but considering Squish is currently restricted to Toonattik, and Pop are just filling it's former weekday timeslots with Johnny Test repeats, we have a really big chance now

🚀 With a lineup boasting #Chaotic, #Squish, #YooHoo, #Pokemon, and #Alvin, things might seem packed on Pop, but with Squish now exclusive to Toonattik and its former weekday slots filled by Johnny Test repeats, we've got a golden opportunity! 🌟 It's our chance to rally for more of what we love! 💪 #BringBackFavorites
Write a tweet about the prospect of Kikoriki returning,

🎉 Calling all #Kikoriki fans! The prospect of our favorite quirky critters making a triumphant return to Pop is more real than ever! 🐰🌈 Let's show our support and make it clear we're ready for new adventures. Time to reunite with our beloved characters! ✨ #KikorikiComeback
Write a tweet with the ad that "made it all happen"  saying that "We're moving to weekends only"

🌟 Big News, Team! 🌈 Thanks to your incredible support and that viral ad campaign that made it all happen, we're excited to announce we're moving to weekends only! 🎉 Catch all your favorite shows now in one power-packed weekend lineup. It's all happening because of YOU! 🙌 #WeekendWatchParty
